creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
Actually, this PR can be closed.  I didn't realize it at the time, but I had 
only cvsup'd the src tree to FreeBSD 7.0 and didn't cvsup the ports tree at all. 
  Once I did that, Perl builds fine.  So it was my mistake.  Sorry for the noise.

Naram Qashat

FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/117589'.
